name: Checklist — IRB Application Requirements with Mixed Statuses
input: Create an IRB application checklist with varying statuses. Done: Protocol synopsis, CITI training certificates, CV for PI and Co-I. Active: Informed consent document (revision 3 under review), HIPAA authorization form. Pending: Data safety monitoring plan, recruitment materials, site assessment, budget justification, FDA IND letter.
qualityCriteria: Status field is used on items
No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
Checklist with status indicators for each item
napkinBenchmark: Vertical checklist with green checkmarks for done, blue spinners for active, and grey circles for pending.

data.title: IRB Application Requirements

items.label: Protocol Synopsis
items.description: Study summary with objectives, design, endpoints

items.label: CITI Training Certificates
items.description: Human subjects research and GCP certifications

items.label: CV for PI and Co-I
items.description: Updated curriculum vitae with recent publications

items.label: HIPAA Authorization Form
items.description: Protected health information use and disclosure authorization

items.label: Data Safety Monitoring Plan
items.description: Adverse event reporting and DSMB charter

items.label: Recruitment Materials
items.description: Flyers, social media ads, physician referral letters

items.label: Budget Justification
items.description: Per-patient costs, investigator effort, lab fees

data.caption: Status of required documents for Institutional Review Board submission
